info.name: Auth Service
info.description:
Maham Auth Service API (maham-auth-expo-api)

Base URL: {{auth_url}}/v1

This collection covers authentication, user management, roles, permissions, services, and service-to-service (S2S) communication.

variable.description: Service record ID for service operations

item.name: 🏥 Health Check
item.description: Health check endpoint for the Auth Service.

request.description:
Check the health status of the Auth Service.

**Authentication:** None required

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, profile management, password reset, token operations, and permission checks.

request.description:
Register a new user. Roles cannot include super-admin, admin, or supervisor.

**Authentication:** None required

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) — Full name of the user
- `email` (string) — Valid email address
- `password` (string) — Minimum 8 characters
- `password_confirmation` (string) — Must match password

**Optional fields:**
- `phone` (string) — Phone number with country code
- `roles` (array of strings) — Allowed: merchant, investor, sponsor. Cannot include super-admin, admin, or supervisor.

Login with email or phone. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute.

**Authentication:** None required

**Required fields:**
- `identifier` (string) — Email or phone number
- `password` (string) — Account password

**Test script:** Automatically saves `access_token` to `auth_token` and `user.id` to `user_id` environment variables.

Get the currently authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

Update the authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Optional fields:**
- `name` (string) — Updated full name
- `phone` (string) — Updated phone number

Change the authenticated user's password.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Required fields:**
- `current_password` (string) — Current account password
- `password` (string) — New password, minimum 8 characters
- `password_confirmation` (string) — Must match new password

Send a password reset link/code to the user's email.

**Authentication:** None required

**Required fields:**
- `email` (string) — Registered email address

Reset a user's password using the token received via email.

**Authentication:** None required

**Required fields:**
- `email` (string) — Registered email address
- `token` (string) — Reset token from the forgot-password email
- `password` (string) — New password, minimum 8 characters
- `password_confirmation` (string) — Must match new password

Refresh the current JWT access token.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required (uses current token to issue a new one)

Logout and invalidate the current token.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

Send an email verification code to the authenticated user's email address.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

Verify the authenticated user's email address using the code sent via email.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Required fields:**
- `code` (string) — Verification code received via email

Verify if a given JWT token is valid.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Required fields:**
- `token` (string) — JWT token to verify

Check if the authenticated user has a specific permission.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Required fields:**
- `permission` (string) — Permission name to check (e.g. users.view)

Check if the authenticated user has multiple permissions at once.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Required fields:**
- `permissions` (array of strings) — List of permission names to check

item.name: 🔌 Service (S2S)
item.description: Service-to-service (S2S) endpoints. Internal Docker network — no authentication required.

request.description:
Verify a user's JWT token via service-to-service call.

**Authentication:** None (internal Docker network)

**Required fields:**
- `token` (string) — The user's JWT token to verify

Check if a user has a specific permission via service-to-service call.

**Authentication:** None (internal Docker network)

**Required fields:**
- `token` (string) — The user's JWT token
- `permission` (string) — Permission name to check

Get user information from a JWT token via service-to-service call.

**Authentication:** None (internal Docker network)

**Required fields:**
- `token` (string) — The user's JWT token

item.name: 👥 Users
item.description: User management endpoints: CRUD operations, role assignment, and permission management.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, suspended

request.description:
List all users with optional filters and pagination.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.view`

**Query parameters (all optional):**
- `page` — Page number
- `per_page` — Items per page
- `search` — Search by name or email
- `status` — Filter by status (active, inactive, suspended)
- `role` — Filter by role name
- `sort_by` — Sort field
- `sort_order` — Sort direction (asc, desc)

Create a new user.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.create`

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) — Full name
- `email` (string) — Valid email address
- `password` (string) — Minimum 8 characters

**Optional fields:**
- `phone` (string) — Phone number with country code
- `status` (string) — User status: active, inactive, suspended (default: active)
- `roles` (array of strings) — Roles to assign
- `metadata` (object) — Additional metadata

Get details of a specific user.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

Update a specific user's details.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

**Optional fields:**
- `name` (string) — Updated full name
- `phone` (string) — Updated phone number
- `status` (string) — Updated status: active, inactive, suspended

Delete a specific user.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.delete`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

Assign roles to a specific user.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

**Required fields:**
- `roles` (array of strings) — Role names to assign

Get all permissions assigned to a specific user (direct and via roles).

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

Assign direct permissions to a specific user.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id` — The user's ID

**Required fields:**
- `permissions` (array of strings) — Permission names to assign

query.description: Stats period: today, week, month, year, all

request.description:
Get user statistics for the admin dashboard.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `users.view`

**Query parameters (optional):**
- `period` — Stats period: today, week, month, year, all

item.name: 🛡️ Roles
item.description: Role management endpoints: CRUD operations and permission assignment for roles.

request.description:
List all roles.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.view`

**Query parameters (all optional):**
- `page` — Page number
- `per_page` — Items per page
- `search` — Search by name or display_name

Create a new role.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.create`

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) — Unique role slug (lowercase, no spaces)

**Optional fields:**
- `display_name` (string) — Human-readable role name
- `description` (string) — Role description

Get details of a specific role including its permissions.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

Update a specific role.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

**Optional fields:**
- `display_name` (string) — Updated human-readable name
- `description` (string) — Updated description

Delete a specific role.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.delete`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

Sync (replace) all permissions for a role. This removes any permissions not in the provided list.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

**Required fields:**
- `permissions` (array of strings) — Complete list of permission names to sync

Add permissions to a role without removing existing ones.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

**Required fields:**
- `permissions` (array of strings) — Permission names to add

Remove specific permissions from a role.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `roles.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `role_id` — The role's ID

**Required fields:**
- `permissions` (array of strings) — Permission names to remove

item.name: 🔑 Permissions
item.description: Permission management endpoints: CRUD operations and bulk resource permission creation.

request.description:
List all permissions.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.view`

**Query parameters (all optional):**
- `page` — Page number
- `per_page` — Items per page
- `search` — Search by name or display_name
- `group` — Filter by permission group

Create a new permission.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.create`

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) — Unique permission slug (e.g. reports.export)

**Optional fields:**
- `display_name` (string) — Human-readable permission name
- `description` (string) — Permission description
- `group` (string) — Permission group for organization

Bulk-create permissions for a resource. Creates permissions in the format resource.action (e.g. events.view, events.create).

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.create`

**Required fields:**
- `resource` (string) — Resource name (e.g. events, users, reports)
- `actions` (array of strings) — Actions to create (e.g. view, create, update, delete)

Get details of a specific permission.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `permission_id` — The permission's ID

Update a specific permission.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `permission_id` — The permission's ID

**Optional fields:**
- `display_name` (string) — Updated human-readable name
- `description` (string) — Updated description

Delete a specific permission.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `permissions.delete`

**Path parameters:**
- `permission_id` — The permission's ID

item.name: ⚙️ Services
item.description: Service management endpoints: CRUD operations, token regeneration, and role management for registered services.

query.description: Filter by active status: true, false

request.description:
List all registered services.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.view`

**Query parameters (all optional):**
- `page` — Page number
- `per_page` — Items per page
- `search` — Search by service name
- `is_active` — Filter by active status (true/false)

Create a new service registration.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.create`

**Required fields:**
- `name` (string) — Unique service name

**Optional fields:**
- `description` (string) — Service description
- `roles` (array of strings) — Roles this service can access (replaces old allowed_permissions)

**Notes:** The roles field defines which user roles this service is allowed to interact with.

Get details of a specific service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

Update a specific service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

**Optional fields:**
- `name` (string) — Updated service name
- `description` (string) — Updated description
- `is_active` (boolean) — Enable or disable the service
- `roles` (array of strings) — Updated roles this service can access

Delete a specific service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.delete`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

Regenerate the service token for a specific service. The old token will be invalidated.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

Get all roles assigned to a specific service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.view`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

Assign additional roles to a specific service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

**Required fields:**
- `roles` (array of strings) — Role names to assign

Sync (replace) all roles for a specific service. Roles not in the provided list will be removed.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

**Required fields:**
- `roles` (array of strings) — Complete list of role names to sync

Remove specific roles from a service.

**Authentication:** Bearer token required

**Permission:** `services.update`

**Path parameters:**
- `service_id` — The service record's ID

**Required fields:**
- `roles` (array of strings) — Role names to remove
